what_was_requested: ETAP 1: Regime-Aware Volatility Gating Feature — create cf_regime_vol_gate ATR-percentile classifier, integrate into strategy, run backtest, and record results
what_was_done: 1. Inspected existing custom features (cf_chop_filter_1h, cf_regime_strength_1h, cf_vol_regime_1h). 2. Validated and published new custom feature cf_regime_vol_gate: ATR-percentile regime classifier that gates long entries when ATR is in bottom quartile (choppy regime). 3. Built feature dataset with new column. 4. Cloned baseline strategy active-signal-v1 → research_regime_gating_v1. 5. Updated long entry logic to require cf_regime_vol_gate==1. 6. Saved version 2 with validated signal. 7. Preflight passed. 8. Ran backtest (run_id: 20260407-152226-361601e8). 9. Recorded research result and added to Gold Collection.
